message:
test(core): add btrfs image builder helpers and extend VFS test coverage

Added 219 lines of btrfs test image construction utilities:

Helpers:
- write_btrfs_leaf_item: Write B-tree leaf item headers with objectid,
  type, key offset, data offset/size
- encode_btrfs_inode_item: Build 160-byte inode item with mode, size,
  nbytes, nlink, uid/gid, and timestamps
- encode_btrfs_dir_index_entry: Create directory index entries with
  child objectid, file type, and variable-length name
- encode_btrfs_extent_regular: Build extent data for regular file
  extents with disk bytenr and num_bytes

These helpers enable construction of synthetic btrfs test images for
comprehensive VFS operation testing without external filesystem tools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
